name: Addon pods stuck Pending in {{kube_namespace.name}}
message:
Addon pods in namespace {{kube_namespace.name}} on cluster $cluster_name have been stuck in Pending state for more than 10 minutes.

    Common causes: insufficient node capacity, node taints, pod affinity/anti-affinity rules, PVC binding issues.
    Check the Addon Deployment Health dashboard → Pod Status section.
